title: wielandia laureola
intro: Wielandia laureola, also known as Bitter Apple or Bitter Leaf, is a plant species in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its bitter and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Wielandia laureola include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a diuretic and expectorant. Wielandia laureola can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
